interface.name: PS_C_StyledCardLayout
interface.description: Use always to display content in cards
interface.definition: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( contents: ri!contents, shape: a!defaultValue(ri!shape, "ROUNDED"), padding: a!defaultValue(ri!padding, "LESS"), marginAbove: a!defaultValue(ri!marginAbove, "LESS"), marginBelow: a!defaultValue(ri!marginBelow, "LESS"), showBorder: a!defaultValue(ri!showBorder, false), borderColor: a!defaultValue(ri!borderColor, #"_a-0000ed87-2144-8000-9bee-011c48011c48_1418913"), showShadow: a!defaultValue(ri!showShadow, true), height: a!defaultValue(ri!height, "AUTO"), style: ri!style, link: ri!link /*decorativeBarPosition: "START",*/ /*decorativeBarColor: "#0077B6"*/ )

namedTypedValue.name: contents
namedTypedValue.description: Components and layouts to display within the card.

namedTypedValue.name: shape
namedTypedValue.description: Determines the card shape. Valid values: "SQUARED", "SEMI_ROUNDED", "ROUNDED" (default).

namedTypedValue.name: padding
namedTypedValue.description: Determines the space between the card edges and its contents. Valid values: "NONE", "EVEN_LESS", "LESS" (default), "STANDARD", "MORE", "EVEN_MORE".

namedTypedValue.name: marginAbove
namedTypedValue.description: Determines how much space is added above the layout. Valid values: "NONE", "EVEN_LESS", "LESS" (default), "STANDARD", "MORE", "EVEN_MORE".

namedTypedValue.name: marginBelow
namedTypedValue.description: Determines how much space is added below the layout. Valid values: "NONE", "EVEN_LESS", "LESS" (default), "STANDARD", "MORE", "EVEN_MORE".

namedTypedValue.name: borderColor
namedTypedValue.description: Determines the border color. Valid values: Any valid hex color or "STANDARD", "ACCENT", "POSITIVE", "WARN", "NEGATIVE".

namedTypedValue.name: style
namedTypedValue.description: Determines the card background color. Valid values: Any valid hex color or "NONE" (default), "TRANSPARENT", "STANDARD", "ACCENT", "SUCCESS", "INFO", "WARN", "ERROR", "CHARCOAL_SCHEME", "NAVY_SCHEME", "PLUM_SCHEME".

namedTypedValue.name: link
namedTypedValue.description: Link to apply to the card. Create a link with a!documentDownloadLink(), a!dynamicLink(), a!newsEntryLink(), a!processTaskLink(), a!recordLink(), a!reportLink(), a!safeLink(), a!startProcessLink(), a!submitLink(), a!userRecordLink(), or a!authorizationLink().

namedTypedValue.name: height
namedTypedValue.description: Determines the card height. Valid values: "EXTRA_SHORT", "SHORT", "SHORT_PLUS", "MEDIUM", "MEDIUM_PLUS", "TALL", "TALL_PLUS", "EXTRA_TALL", "AUTO" (default).
